Home › Membership
Simple, Transparent, Valuable

Membership & Pricing

One flat monthly fee. Unlimited primary care. Direct doctor access. And something no other DPC practice on the Main Line offers — in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine.

"
Your membership includes something no other DPC practice on the Main Line offers: integrated, in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine. A physician with a culinary arts degree, a nutrition science background, and a Lifestyle Medicine board certification who knows your name, answers your calls, and has a plan for your long-term health. That's what the membership covers.
Choose Your Plan

Membership Options

Individual

Individual Membership

$200/month

Primary care plus board-certified lifestyle medicine — for you, personally.

  • Unlimited office visits, no copay
  • Same-day and next-day appointments
  • New patient visits: 2 hours | Follow-ups: 1 hour
  • Direct phone, text & email access to your doctor
  • Preventive care and annual wellness exams
  • Chronic disease management
  • Minor in-office procedures
  • Wholesale lab and medication pricing
  • Telehealth visits
  • Specialist referral coordination
  • Board-certified Lifestyle Medicine (with Dr. Lieberman)
Enroll as Individual Or start with a free meet & greet →
Family

Family Membership

2 members$175/person/month
3 members$150/person/month
4 members$125/person/month
5+ members$100/person/month

Whole-family care — every member gets direct access, real time, and genuine relationship.

  • Everything in Individual Membership
  • Coverage for 2 or more family members
  • Each member gets their own doctor relationship
  • Coordinated family health planning
  • Pediatric-friendly care options
  • Wholesale lab pricing for the whole family
  • All members access Lifestyle Medicine with Dr. Lieberman
Enroll Your Family Or start with a free meet & greet →
Employer

Employer / Business

Contact us for pricing

Better healthcare for your team — simpler than traditional insurance and genuinely more valuable.

  • Flat per-employee monthly membership
  • Pairs with your existing health plan
  • Employees get unlimited primary care, no copays
  • Direct doctor access for your whole team
  • Fewer sick days and ER visits
  • Access to board-certified Lifestyle Medicine
  • Inquiry-based — we'll build a plan for your company
Learn About Employer Plans Or contact us directly →
Already a patient? Log in to the Patient Portal →
Panel size is capped at ~250 patients per physician to ensure timely access to your doctor. When a panel fills, we open a waitlist.
Not sure which plan is right for you?

Start with a free, no-obligation meet and greet. Come in, meet the team, ask every question — and we'll help you figure out the best fit. No pressure, no commitment.

Full Breakdown

What Your Membership Covers

Primary Care

  • Annual physicals and wellness exams
  • Sick visits and acute care
  • Preventive screenings and immunizations
  • Chronic condition monitoring
  • Prescription management
  • Lab review and follow-up

Access & Convenience

  • Same-day and next-day appointments
  • New patient visits: 2 hours | Follow-ups: 1 hour
  • Direct phone, text, and email access
  • Telehealth included
  • After-hours communication (urgent questions)

Lifestyle Medicine

  • Comprehensive lifestyle assessment
  • Personalized nutrition guidance
  • Physical activity planning
  • Sleep optimization
  • Stress management
  • Chronic disease reversal protocols

Cost Savings

  • Wholesale lab pricing (significant savings)
  • Wholesale medication pricing
  • Reduced ER and urgent care visits
  • No per-visit fees or copays
  • HSA/FSA eligible (confirm with your administrator)
FAQ

Membership FAQs

No. DPC membership is not insurance. It covers your primary care needs directly. We recommend pairing it with a high-deductible health plan or health sharing plan to cover hospitalizations, surgeries, and specialist care.

In many cases, yes — particularly following the Primary Care Enhancement Act (effective January 1, 2026), which clarified that HSA funds may be used for DPC memberships. Please confirm eligibility with your plan administrator.

Unlimited office visits (no copay), same-day and next-day appointments, new patient visits up to 2 hours and follow-up visits up to 1 hour, direct phone/text/email access to your doctor, preventive care, chronic disease management, minor procedures, wholesale lab pricing, telehealth, specialist referral coordination, and integrated Lifestyle Medicine with Dr. Lieberman.

No. Lifestyle medicine is integrated into how Dr. Lieberman practices — it's part of your membership, not an add-on service.

Please contact us to discuss your specific situation. Our goal is to make membership work for you.

Your DPC membership covers primary care. For specialist referrals, we coordinate directly — calling ahead, advocating for you, and ensuring continuity of care. For hospitalizations and surgical care, you'll need a separate insurance plan.

The Best Time to Start Is Now

Begin with a free, no-obligation meet and greet. No paperwork, no credit card, no pressure. Just a conversation with your future doctor.

Schedule My Free Meet & Greet
FFM Forward Family Medicine

The Main Line's only Direct Primary Care practice with in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine.

© 2026 Forward Family Medicine. All rights reserved.

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
